docs.title: Welcome to the Knowledge Atlas
docs.text:
Select a textbook below to begin your journey.

  • Biology --- Explore the science of life, from cells to ecosystems. Start Reading

  • Physics --- Master the laws of the universe, motion, and energy. Start Reading

  • The Team --- Learn more about the educators behind these resources. Meet Us

docs.title: Meet the Educators
docs.text:
Our team is composed of passionate subject-matter experts and developers dedicated to open-source education.

  • Dr. Aris Thorne ---

    Lead Editor - Biology

    Specializes in cellular biology. Aris oversees the curriculum accuracy for all life sciences.

    GitHub · Portfolio

  • Prof. Elena Vance ---

    Head of Physics

    A theoretical physicist focusing on making complex motion laws accessible to beginners.

    GitHub · LinkedIn

  • Technical Team ---

    Platform Architecture

    Managing the "Ghost" deployment pipeline and ensuring the Knowledge Atlas stays online.

    Contact Us
